title: Top scientist admits universe is 'teeming with life'... and reveals what first contact will look like amid Trump's UFO disclosure
description: One of America's most famous scientists has revealed what every person must know as the possibility of first contact with extraterrestrials reaches a tipping point.

title: Pentagon UFO release details NM's fabled history with the unknown
description: Many of the files are marked “SECRET.” More than a dozen center on events that occurred in New Mexico. The Pentagon last week released what it described as an “unprecedented, historic” batch of previously classified files concerning UFOs, UAPs and over 80 years of government conjecture about the existence of “alien and extraterrestrial life.” "These files, hidden behind classifications, have...

title: Chilling 'alien' message to humanity revealed in latest UFO disclosure files
description: Recently released FBI documents from 1955 detailed claims that aliens sent messages to members of one of the oldest UFO organizations in the U.S.

title: Hunter Biden resurfaces in LA, reacts to questions about Biden tapes, UFO files
description: Hunter Biden was approached by a videographer in West Los Angeles and asked about litigation to force release of President Joe Biden's interview tapes.

title: Hunter Biden spotted in LA addressing questions on father’s tapes and UFO files release
description: Hunter Biden made a rare public appearance in West Los Angeles this week, where paparazzi captured the former first son responding to questions about ongoing legal matters involving his father. The encounter occurred near Wilshire Boulevard, marking one of his first sightings since retreating from public view in recent months. Reporters approached him with questions [...]
